name: Celery, Potato and Chicken Skillet Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound red-skinned potatoes, cut into 3/4-inch pieces
12 ounces boneless skinless chicken breast, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1 quart water to a boil in a medium saucepan over high heat.
2. Add potatoes, 1 cup celery and 1/2 cup celery leaves. Reduce heat to medium; simmer, covered, for 7-8 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Drain, reserving cooking liquid and vegetables separately.
3. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken, bell pepper, and remaining 1 cup celery. Cook, stirring constantly, for 6-7 minutes, or until chicken is no longer pink.
4. Stir in tomato paste, rosemary, sugar, black pepper, and 2 cups reserved celery liquid. Bring to a boil; cook until sauce thickens, about 4 minutes.
5. Add reserved potatoes and celery. Season to taste with salt. Sprinkle with remaining celery leaves.
